title: Anchorage Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Anchorage with a Z-Score of -4.03. Temperatures are extremely low, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current cold snap in Anchorage is causing temperatures to drop significantly, with a critical level warning issued. 
 The city is experiencing high humidity at 78% and very low wind speeds of 0.8 km/h. 
 Heating degree days (HDD) are at 15.1 GG, indicating a high demand for heating energy.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
